prose:
**Formaldehyde frontier-orbital gap** — Koopmans-style HOMO–LUMO gap by DFT, **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (tier `standard`, density-fitting RIJK) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz` (no DFT optimization). SCF converged in 8 cycles with no warnings reported. HOMO = −7.6523067 eV; LUMO = −1.7826355 eV → **gap = 5.8696712 eV**. Command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpskyopdbm/live.json`.
Result JSON: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpskyopdbm/live.json`.
